title: Medical Temporal Constraint Extraction Dataset
author: Parker Seegmiller
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains 836 drug usage guidelines labeled with medical temporal constraints. These constraints conform to a context-free grammar, allowing their semantics to be computationally represented.
steps_raw: This dataset contains 836 drug usage guidelines labeled with medical temporal constraints. These constraints conform to a context-free grammar, allowing their semantics to be computationally represented.
keywords: health nlp, medical nlp, information extraction, text-to-structure, medication information extraction
